positive: A mystical bioluminescent forest scene, viewed from a central clearing. The foreground features giant, glowing ginger lilies with intricate vein patterns, surrounded by crystalline fungal growths emitting soft blue and purple light. Tall, stylized jungle canopy pillars rise in the background, covered in swirling, magical energy lines. The overall atmosphere is serene and otherworldly, utilizing a color palette dominated by emerald green, deep midnight blue, and luminous cyan accents. Style should be highly detailed digital painting, combining Art Nouveau curvature with modern maximalism. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, with clear negative space for text placement. Excellent contrast, strong outlines, and visible texture on all surfaces. Printed on a matte, slightly distressed background.
negative: blur, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, poorly rendered, grain, text, watermark, signature, out of focus, cartoon, messy, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs
